raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 1468 expands access to opioid treatment by ensuring that more healthcare providers are aware of the Drug Enforcement Agency's new 'Three-Day Rule'.",
    "The 'Three-Day Rule' allows non-physician practitioners to dispense a three-day supply of medication to initiate opioid detoxification or maintenance treatment.",
    "In 2022, fentanyl was responsible for 88% of all opioid-related overdose deaths in California.",
    "SB 1468 empowers healthcare providers to offer more timely and effective treatment for opioid use disorder.",
    "This law will reduce overdose deaths and help those suffering from opioid use disorder access critical care more quickly.",
    "Access to specialized addiction treatment can be limited in underserved areas."
  ]
}
```
